causalAutopsy.notes: In-flight injects have been process-local since the spawn/inject split was introduced; the readiness wait (seconds for claude, tens of seconds for codex) created a restart-loss window that the calm-world cadence never exposed. Surfaced 2026-06-06 when the ~15-min release cadence put an auto-updater restart inside the window (finding 8d300555; the operator's own message was the casualty). Environment-shift made a latent design gap live — the restart-churn-is-weather class the run-2 playbook exists for.
